source_commit_note: Dispatch should use the merge commit that routes softmax_recip_lut endpoint full on-chip service jobs to the corrected q8/q10/q12 full-search source.

requested_items.objective: Apply explicit on-chip SRAM bank, endpoint queue, bank queue, packet payload, router latency, scheduling, and overlap policies to the corrected reciprocal-LUT endpoint full-search Llama7B frontier.

expected_result.reason: The result should identify the best explicit on-chip service policy and selected q8/q10/q12 profile without changing HBM/DRAM assumptions.
